title: WORKDIR instruction should be preferred instead of cd commands
description: In Dockerfile, instructions RUN, CMD, and ENTRYPOINT can contain long shell scripts chaining multiple commands, including the cd command for changing directories. Using WORKDIR instruction instead reduces the complexity of the above instructions and makes them easier to read, understand, troubleshoot, and maintain. What is the potential impact? The Dockerfile instructions like RUN allow users to execute longer scripts.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: WORKDIR instruction should be used instead of 'cd' commands. Using 'cd' in RUN, CMD, or ENTRYPOINT makes the Dockerfile harder to read and maintain. Replace 'cd' commands with the WORKDIR instruction to explicitly set the working directory for subsequent instructions.
